title: Anoma Tweaks
description: A comprehensive visual enhancement mod with 20+ modules including HUD elements, combat features, movement improvements, and advanced customization options.
body:
# AnomaTweaks

AnomaTweaks is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft `1.21.8` focused on clean visuals, compact HUD elements, and practical quality-of-life tools. It combines lightweight rendering upgrades, draggable overlays, utility helpers, and a built-in Click GUI designed around fast customization instead of clutter.

![AnomaTweaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8756b143116e241caa751310aeabe8872ee84ac_0.webp)

## Important Notice

AnomaTweaks is a client-side mod built around visuals, interface polish, utility features, and lightweight helpers. It is not intended to be a blatant automation or exploit-heavy client.

Always check the rules of the server you play on before using any client mod.

## Features

### Visual and World Tweaks
- **Ambience** - Recolor fog and environment tones for a cleaner atmosphere
- **Aspect Ratio** - Adjust the in-game camera aspect ratio with smooth transitions
- **Block Overlay** - Replace the vanilla block outline with a configurable fill and outline overlay
- **Fullbright** - Keep dark areas fully visible
- **Hand View Model** - Tweak first-person hand position, scale, and motion
- **Hit Color** - Customize the damage tint shown on entities
- **Hitbox Overlay** - Draw player hitboxes with configurable outline and fill
- **No Fire Overlay** - Hide or reduce the fire overlay
- **No Render** - Hide selected overlays and effects such as fog, glow, scoreboard, and crosshair
- **Sky Tweaks** - Change client-side time-of-day and weather appearance
- **Swing Animation** - Add configurable swing presets
- **Target ESP** - Highlight the current target with animated rings or cubes
- **UHC Overlay** - Scale important dropped items like heads, gapples, gold, and totems

### HUD and Interface
- **Armor HUD** - Show armor, held item, and offhand durability in a compact overlay
- **Chat Bubbles** - Render floating chat bubbles above players
- **Coordinates HUD** - Show position, facing, and local time
- **Cooldown HUD** - Display active item cooldowns from your inventory
- **Cooldowns** - Render remaining cooldown seconds directly on slots
- **Effect Notify** - Warn when useful potion effects are about to end or just expired
- **Effects** - Render active status effects with a custom animated overlay
- **FPS HUD** - Display current FPS
- **Friends** - Apply shared friend rules for combat and visual modules
- **Menu** - Customize Click GUI color, blur, scale, tooltips, and opening animation
- **Ping HUD** - Display server latency
- **Target HUD** - Show target info with draggable layouts, including classic and profile styles

### Utility and Movement
- **Auto Sprint** - Sprint automatically while moving forward
- **Freelook** - Move the camera independently from player direction while holding a custom key
- **Item Scroller** - Reduce or remove inventory drag delay
- **Lock Slot** - Prevent selected hotbar slots from being moved or dropped
- **Mouse Sounds** - Add configurable mouse click sounds
- **Name Protect** - Replace your nickname in chat and UI elements
- **NoCapsLock** - Keep typing readable even with Caps Lock enabled
- **Potion Highlight** - Highlight potion slots in inventories and hotbar
- **Safe Leave** - Ask for confirmation before leaving while PvP protection appears active
- **SnapTap** - Prioritize the latest key in opposite movement inputs
- **Valuable Items** - Highlight important dropped items in inventories and world rendering

### Combat and Helpers
- **FTHelper** - Draw landing circles for supported throwable and utility items
- **Low Health Alert** - Warn when your health drops below a configurable threshold
- **Shift Tap** - Briefly sneak during jumps to help with crit timing
- **Trajectory Preview** - Preview projectile paths and landing zones for supported items

### Built-In Systems
- **Config Profiles** - Create, load, remove, export, and import full client configs
- **Friends List** - Save friend names and reuse them across supported modules
- **Keybind Management** - Bind modules and settings through the built-in bind system
- **Macros** - Store keybound chat messages and commands in the integrated macro workspace
- **Command Support** - Built-in commands for configs, binds, and friends with suggestions
- **Draggable HUD** - Move supported HUD elements directly in the UI

## Design Goals

- **Readable by Default** - Clear overlays and useful information without visual noise
- **Utility First** - Everyday convenience features over bloated gimmicks
- **Customizable** - Flexible colors, positions, animations, and per-module settings
- **Lightweight Feel** - Fast client-side tools that stay practical in real gameplay

## Requirements

- Minecraft `1.21.8`
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

## Customization

Every module can be configured through the built-in Click GUI, including colors, positions, blur, animations, visibility, and module-specific settings. The menu is bound to **Right Shift** by default.
